title: stylidium calcaratum
intro: Stylidium calcaratum, also known as the clubbed triggerplant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Stylidiaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Stylidium calcaratum include reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing, making it a potential treatment for various skin conditions. Stylidium calcaratum can be prepared into various herbal remedies, such as infusions, decoctions, and poultices, to harness its medicinal properties.
